showOnLock.name: Show on lock screen
showOnLock.description: Allow show context on lock screen
showOnLock.description[zh_CN]: 允许在锁屏界面上显示内容

lostScreen.name: Behaivor when lost screen
lostScreen.description: Behaivor when lost screen, allow value: MoveToPrimary、Minimize
lostScreen.description[zh_CN]: 丢失屏幕的行为，可选值为：MoveToPrimary、Minimize

preferDark.name: Prefer Dark
preferDark.description[zh_CN]: 颜色方案是否倾向暗色

cursorBlinkTime.name: Cursor Blink Time
cursorBlinkTime.description: Length of the cursor blink cycle, in milleseconds
cursorBlinkTime.description[zh_CN]: 光标闪烁周期的长度，以千秒为单位

doubleClickTime.name: Double Click Time
doubleClickTime.description: Maximum time allowed between two clicks for them to be considered a double click (in milliseconds)
doubleClickTime.description[zh_CN]: 两次单击之间允许被视为双击的最长时间（以毫秒为单位）

doubleClickDistance.name: Double Click Distance
doubleClickDistance.description: Maximum distance allowed between two clicks for them to be considered a double click (in pixels)
doubleClickDistance.description[zh_CN]: 两次单击之间允许被视为双击的最大距离（以像素为单位）

dndDragThreshold.name: Dnd Drag Threshold
dndDragThreshold.description: Number of pixels the cursor can move before dragging
dndDragThreshold.description[zh_CN]: 拖动之前光标可以移动的像素数

windowOpacity.name: Global Window Opacity
windowOpacity.description[zh_CN]: 设置所有窗口的不透明度

windowThemeType.name: Global Window Theme Type
windowThemeType.description[zh_CN]: 系统主题类型：1 亮色，2 暗色

windowTitlebarHeight.name: Global Window titlebar height
windowTitlebarHeight.description: Set all window default titlebar height
windowTitlebarHeight.description[zh_CN]: 设置所有窗口默认的标题栏高度

defaultBackground.name: Default background
defaultBackground.description: Set the default displayed wallpaper, when no wallpaper is set
defaultBackground.description[zh_CN]: 当没有设置壁纸时，设置默认显示的壁纸

workspaceThumbCornerRadius.name: Workspace thumbnail corner radius
workspaceThumbCornerRadius.name[zh_CN]: 工作区缩略图圆角弧度
workspaceThumbCornerRadius.description[zh_CN]: 工作区缩略图圆角弧度

minMultitaskviewSurfaceHeight.name: Multitask view surface minimal height
minMultitaskviewSurfaceHeight.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图表面最小高度
minMultitaskviewSurfaceHeight.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图表面最小高度

multitaskviewPaddingOpacity.name: Multitaskview padding opacity
multitaskviewPaddingOpacity.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内边距不透明度
multitaskviewPaddingOpacity.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内边距不透明度

multitaskviewEasingCurveType.name: Multitaskview easing curve type
multitaskviewEasingCurveType.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图缓动曲线类型
multitaskviewEasingCurveType.description: Multitaskview easing curve type, enumerate value of QEasingCurve::Type
multitaskviewEasingCurveType.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图缓动曲线类型，其值为QEasingCurve::Type类型的枚举值

multitaskviewTopContentMargin.name: Multitaskview top content margin
multitaskviewTopContentMargin.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内容顶边距
multitaskviewTopContentMargin.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内容顶边距

multitaskviewBottomContentMargin.name: Multitaskview bottom content margin
multitaskviewBottomContentMargin.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内容底边距
multitaskviewBottomContentMargin.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图内容底边距

multitaskviewCellPadding.name: Multitaskview cell padding
multitaskviewCellPadding.name[zh_CN]: 多任务视图单元格间距
multitaskviewCellPadding.description[zh_CN]: 多任务视图单元格间距

wallpaperConfig.name: Wallpaper Config
wallpaperConfig.description: A configuration to manage wallpapers used by the system, including desktop and lockscreen wallpapers for each screen and workspace.
wallpaperConfig.description[zh_CN]: 用于管理系统当前使用的壁纸配置，包括每个屏幕和工作区的桌面壁纸和锁屏壁纸。

glassEnabled.name: Glass Effect Enabled
glassEnabled.description: Use the Liquid Glass effect for backdrop blur regions instead of the plain blur. When disabled, the traditional Gaussian blur is used with no side effects.
glassEnabled.description[zh_CN]: 是否在背景模糊区域使用液态玻璃效果替代普通模糊。关闭时使用传统高斯模糊，无额外副作用。

blurStrength.name: Blur Strength
blurStrength.description: Maximum blur strength (in pixels) applied to the backdrop blur regions. When set to 0, blur is completely disabled. Range: 0-128.
blurStrength.description[zh_CN]: 背景模糊的最大强度（像素）。设置为 0 时将完全关闭模糊效果。范围：0-128。

glassBezel.name: Glass Bezel Width
glassBezel.description: The rounded edge bevel width in pixels for the Liquid Glass effect. Range: 2-60.
glassBezel.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃效果的圆角边缘倒角宽度（像素）。范围：2-60。

glassThickness.name: Glass Base Thickness
glassThickness.description: The glass thickness in pixels for Liquid Glass refraction. Range: 10.0-200.0.
glassThickness.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃折射使用的玻璃厚度（像素）。范围：10.0-200.0。

blurAmount.name: Blur Amount
blurAmount.description: Normalized blur amount applied by Qt MultiEffect. 0 disables the blur contribution while keeping the effect item alive; default 0.6 uses 60% of the configured blur strength. Range: 0.0-1.0.
blurAmount.description[zh_CN]: Qt MultiEffect 使用的归一化模糊量。0 表示关闭模糊贡献但保留效果项；默认 0.6 表示使用配置模糊强度的 60%。范围：0.0-1.0。

blurMultiplier.name: Blur Multiplier
blurMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to extend the backdrop blur radius. 0 keeps Qt MultiEffect's default-quality blur radius; larger values extend the radius but reduce quality. Range: 0.0-4.0.
blurMultiplier.description[zh_CN]: 用于扩展背景模糊半径的倍率。0 表示使用 Qt MultiEffect 的默认质量模糊半径；值越大会扩展半径但降低质量。范围：0.0-4.0。

glassIor.name: Glass Refraction Index
glassIor.description: Refraction index used by the Liquid Glass material. Default 1.5 matches common glass. Range: 1.0-3.0.
glassIor.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃材质使用的折射率。默认 1.5 对应常见玻璃。范围：1.0-3.0。

glassSpecular.name: Glass Specular
glassSpecular.description: Specular highlight opacity for the Liquid Glass rim. Range: 0.0-1.0.
glassSpecular.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃边缘的镜面高光不透明度。范围：0.0-1.0。

glassTint.name: Glass Tint
glassTint.description: White tint mix for the Liquid Glass material. 0 disables tint. Range: 0.0-0.4.
glassTint.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃材质的白色染色混合比例。0 表示关闭染色。范围：0.0-0.4。

glassBrightness.name: Glass Brightness
glassBrightness.description: Brightness adjustment applied to the Liquid Glass backdrop before refraction. 0 keeps the sampled backdrop unchanged. Range: -1.0-1.0.
glassBrightness.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃折射前应用于背景采样的亮度调节。0 表示保持采样背景不变。范围：-1.0-1.0。

glassContrast.name: Glass Contrast
glassContrast.description: Contrast adjustment applied by Qt MultiEffect before Liquid Glass refraction. 0 keeps the sampled backdrop unchanged. Range: -1.0-1.0.
glassContrast.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃折射前由 Qt MultiEffect 应用的对比度调节。0 表示保持采样背景不变。范围：-1.0-1.0。

glassSaturation.name: Glass Saturation
glassSaturation.description: Saturation adjustment applied by Qt MultiEffect before Liquid Glass refraction. Default 0.04 adds a subtle saturation lift. Range: -1.0-1.0.
glassSaturation.description[zh_CN]: 液态玻璃折射前由 Qt MultiEffect 应用的饱和度调节。默认 0.04 表示轻微提升饱和度。范围：-1.0-1.0。
